sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111278" key="filo/liqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλό-λῐθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111278.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of precious stones,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.462d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
